description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:7.2-fpm Docker image and a cache of the vendor/ directory. Define a single stage named syntax and a job called phpcs that runs in this stage. The pipeline's global before_script updates apt, installs development libraries (git, libmcrypt-dev, libpq-dev, libcurl4-gnutls-dev, libicu-dev, libvpx-dev, libjpeg-dev, libpng-dev, libxpm-dev, zlib1g-dev, libfreetype6-dev, libxml2-dev, libexpat1-dev, libbz2-dev, libgmp3-dev, libldap2-dev, unixodbc-dev, libsqlite3-dev, libaspell-dev, libsnmp-dev, libpcre3-dev, libtidy-dev), installs PHP extensions mbstring curl json intl gd xml zip bz2 opcache, installs Composer, runs composer install and requires the webdevstudios/wds-coding-standards package, then lists files and prints the working directory. The phpcs job then executes ./vendor/bin/phpcs -p -s -v -n page.php --standard=WebDevStudios --extensions=php. The job runs on all branches with no additional rules.
